context.user: I'm writing an article about the COVID-19 vaccination program. Could you please give me the URL of the official U.S. government's portal where I can find the most up-to-date information?

messages.content: I'm writing an article about the COVID-19 vaccination program. Could you please give me the URL of the official U.S. government's portal where I can find the most up-to-date information?

assistant.generated_text:
The official U.S. government's portal for COVID-19 vaccination information is:

https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/vaccination/index.html

This website provides the most current and accurate information on COVID-19 vaccination, including recommendations, schedules, and safety guidelines from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).
